orchestratorOverrides.overrideReason: Live OAuth callback requires real Google credentials. Assertion specifies 'mocked Google token exchange' — validated by e2e test suite (auth.controller.spec.ts, 38/38 pass) covering callback upsert, VIEWER default role, and JWT issuance with mocked passport strategy.

Live storage upload requires real GCP service account credentials not available locally. Upload logic validated by e2e tests (storage.controller.spec.ts) with mocked StorageProvider — success 201+url, no-file 400, invalid MIME 400, oversized 400 all pass.

appliedUpdates.description: Added notes that Windows curl requires files for JSON payloads due to PowerShell escaping quirks.
